dedupe_summary.description: Summary of deduplication: how many findings, how many unique groups, clustering approach used.

groups.description: Deduplication groups. Each group clusters findings that share the same root cause.

root_cause.description: Description of the shared root cause across all members of this group.

canonical_finding_index.description: Index (0-based) into the input findings array for the canonical/representative finding.

member_finding_indices.description: All finding indices (0-based) that belong to this group, including the canonical.

confidence.description: How confident the model is that these findings share a root cause.

orphaned_finding_indices.description: Indices of findings that could not be clustered into any group.
